summary: Classified Codex skill-scan over-budget warnings as non-blocking only when skill-search MCP is configured as the large-library route.
proof: mcp skill-search catalog_stats => qdrant_health=true ollama_health=true total_skills=455 filesystem_skills=490
python3 .flywheel/scripts/bead-blocker-sync.py doctor => status=pass blocked_bead_count=11 synced_count=11 missing_count=0 malformed_count=0
boundary: This does not claim Codex's internal warning is gone. It makes the warning unable to masquerade as a blocker while the configured MCP fallback covers skill discovery; if the fallback disappears, the probe fails.
